cases.command_line: printf 'READY\n'; while IFS= read -r line; do printf 'got:%s\n' "$line"; done; echo EOF_SEEN

cases.command_line: printf 'READY\n'; n=0; while IFS= read -r line; do case "$line" in STOP) break ;; *) n=$((n+1)); printf '[%s]=%s\n' "$n" "$line" ;; esac; done; [ "$n" -eq 3 ] && echo OK || echo BAD:$n
cases.description: Spaces and pipes written to stdin remain data, not shell syntax.
